input.background: An SRS of n = 26 boys between the ages of 13 and 14 has a mean height of 63.8 inches with a standard deviation 3.1 inches.
input.question: Calculate a 95% confidence interval for the mean height of the population.

sample_size.description: The number of boys in the sample.

mean_height.description: The mean height of the sample of boys.

standard_deviation.description: The standard deviation of the heights in the sample.

confidence_level.description: The confidence level for the interval estimation.
